content:
# Matzen Field

**Summary**: A field used as a case study for polymer flooding and well optimization.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023]] used the Matzen field to model the impact of viscosity (2.5, 10, 100 cP) and viscoelasticity on horizontal well length.

## Geological and Structural Setting



## Formations Present



## Key Findings From This Location

- For a 100 cP polymer, required lengths ranged from 400 ft to 1,600 ft depending on the elasticity index. ([[2023-alameer|Alameer, 2023, p. 83]])
